enum Node {
    Leaf(u64),
    Branch(Box<BranchData>),
}

struct BranchData {
    left: Box<Node>,
    right: Box<Node>,
    metadata: [u8; 4096],
    label: String,
    tags: Vec<String>,
}

enum Response {
    Ok,
    Error(String),
    Data(Box<LargePayload>),
}

struct LargePayload {
    body: Vec<u8>,
    headers: Vec<String>,
    ids: Vec<u64>,
}
